doc_content.summary: The stark-update-deps skill systematically audits and updates project dependencies across multiple ecosystems (Python, Node, Docker, Go, Rust). Crucially, it employs a strict post-update verification loop to combat LLM version hallucination—requiring empirical proof from package registries and Docker Hub that exact target tags exist before finalizing the update.
key_features: Multi-ecosystem dependency discovery via AST/regex across manifests (pyproject.toml, package.json, Dockerfile, etc.)
Turn-optimized batched WebSearch parallelization, grouped by ecosystem domains
Active LTS and semantic stability bias for base runtimes (Node, Python)
Actionable major-bump analysis that proactively discovers CLI codemod tools
Strict Anti-Hallucination loop that re-scans mutated files and searches exact tags on DockerHub/PyPI to verify existence

alt_text: `Architecture flow diagram and feature breakdown for the stark-update-deps skill, highlighting its six-phase process: Discovery, Research, Compatibility Analysis, Update, Verification (anti-hallucination), and Reporting.`
